character_buff.name: Nature
character_buff.description: Maximizes your own ability by stabilizing your body and soul through the energy of nature.

skills.name: Recover
skills.description: Cure various abnormal disease that might afflict team members.

skills.name: Resuscitation
skills.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Cure All
skills.description: Restores HP of an ally by large amount.

skills.name: Mass Cure
skills.description: Fully recover HP of all team members.

skills.name: Spiritual Shield
skills.description: Grants the allies powerful Mental Protection

skills.name: Anti-Magic Shell
skills.description: Grants the allies powerful Elemental Protection.

skills.name: Protection Field
skills.description: Grants a powerful defensive field to friendly forces. However you cant use items.

skills.name: Dispel Magic
skills.description: Removes all buffs and curses on team members and on all enemies around you and decreases SP Recovery for a while.
